name: @code-yeongyu/codex-telemetry
description: Codex plugin component that emits omo-codex anonymous daily-active telemetry on SessionStart.

scripts.build: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist',{recursive:true,force:true})" && bun build src/cli.ts --target node --format esm --outfile dist/cli.js && bun build src/posthog.ts --target node --format esm --outfile dist/posthog.js
scripts.check: tsc --noEmit && biome check . && npm run build
